title: Honda Motorcycle India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Honda Motorcycle India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Honda Motorcycle India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Honda Motorcycle India:
Honda Motorcycle India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
